hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null | grep -qE 'git commit'; then cd /Users/jominho/Develop/ai-study && npm run build 2>&1 | grep -E 'error|Error|✓|✅' | tail -5; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo '❌ QA_GATE FAILED: 빌드 실패. 커밋 차단.'; exit 1; fi; echo '✅ QA_GATE PASSED'; fi
cd /Users/jominho/Develop/ai-study && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E '^src/|error TS' | head -10; if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ]; then echo '❌ TypeScript 에러 감지 — 수정 필요'; exit 2; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null | grep -qE 'git push'; then echo '📦 COMPOUND: push 완료! /compound 실행하여 changelog + 회고 + 솔루션 문서화하세요.'; fi
